perks: 4% cashback on five everyday categories, each capped monthly: supermarket and grocery (AED 300), fuel and automobile (AED 300), school and education (AED 300), dining and restaurants (AED 200) and utility payments (AED 100). Total cashback capped at AED 1,000 per month.
Cashback is earned on those listed categories only; general and international spend earns nothing.

FX fee: ADIB's KFS and product page do not state a foreign-currency fee, and the Schedule of Charges table is not cleanly legible — recorded as an indicative 2.99% and flagged for review.
